Who I Am

About Me

A fresher with real-world internship experience, eager to land my first full-time opportunity in Python development or data engineering.

My Background

From College to Real-World Python Automation

I'm a final-year B.Tech Computer Science student at GH Raisoni College of Engineering and Management, Nagpur. I discovered my passion for Python early on and channelled it into hands-on internships where I built real production-grade scrapers and automation pipelines.

During my internship at AB Infotech Solutions, I independently built Selenium-based scrapers that cut manual research time by 70% and processed 5,000+ data points weekly — turning messy web data into clean, structured CSV datasets.

As a fresher, I bring fresh energy, a strong academic foundation (CGPA 8.50), and proven practical skills. I'm actively looking for internships or entry-level roles in Python development, automation, or data engineering.

Work History

Internship Experience

Real-world experience through internships — the foundation of my practical Python and automation skills.

🏢
Python Developer Intern
Jun 2025 – Dec 2025
AB Infotech Solutions Pvt Ltd · Pune
  • Developed Selenium automation scripts to scrape public web data, cutting manual collection time by 70%
  • Cleaned and structured raw web data into CSV/Excel formats using Pandas for internal analysis and reporting
  • Built data pipelines for email extraction and social media sentiment analysis — processing 5,000+ data points weekly
  • Monitored product availability and pricing across e-commerce platforms with real-time scrapers
  • Handled dynamic content and anti-bot mechanisms using advanced Selenium WebDriver techniques

Python Programming Intern

Maximum Solutions Automation Training Institute · Nagpur
  • Built automation tools in Python with focus on data manipulation using NumPy and Pandas
  • Collaborated in agile team projects to deliver working automation solutions
